name: Ridley Corporation Limited
summary: Ridley Corporation Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides animal nutrition solutions in Australia. The company offers animal nutrition feed in packaged form from 10 √Ç¬ñ 30 kg bags; monogastric and ruminant commercial feeds; fish meals; and animal meals, including meat and bone meal, poultry meal, feather meal, blood meal, and custom blended products. It offers products primarily under the Ridley, Barastoc, Rumevite, Cobber, and Primo brands. The company provides its animal nutrition solutions in dairy, poultry, pig, beef, horse, sheep, pet food, aquaculture, and lifestyle industries. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
